task_completion.description: Center the restaurant name and location lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'HARTWELL'S KITCHEN & BAR' and the location line below it to be horizontally centered on the page.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 2' style to the six category headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the category names (Starters, Soups & Salads, Entrées, Sides, Desserts, Beverages) to be styled as headings (typically larger, bolded, or distinct from normal text).

task_completion.description: Move item descriptions to a new line below the item name and remove parentheses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the menu items. The description text should be on the line directly below the item name, and there should be no parentheses '(' or ')' around the description.

task_completion.description: Format the item descriptions in italics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the description text below the menu items. The text should be slanted (italicized).

task_completion.description: Use a right-aligned tab stop with dot leaders to align the price to the right margin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for prices aligned perfectly to the right side of the document, with a continuous line of dots (......) connecting the item name to the price.
Look at the application title bar or a 'Save As' dialog box to confirm the file is named 'menu_formatted.docx' and located in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a word processor GUI (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the LibreOffice Writer interface or similar word processor GUI in the screenshots. The agent should not be using terminal commands or text editors like nano/vim.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used actual tab leaders instead of manually typing periods.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for perfectly uniform dot spacing and exact right-alignment of prices, or the paragraph/tab settings dialog box being used, rather than irregular manually typed periods.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a python script to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows showing python scripts (like python-docx) being executed to format the document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The restaurant name to be centered is 'HARTWELL'S KITCHEN & BAR'. The six categories to be styled as Heading 2 are: 'Starters', 'Soups & Salads', 'Entrées', 'Sides', 'Desserts', 'Beverages'. The final document must be saved as 'menu_formatted.docx' in /home/ga/Documents/.
